capabilities.label: Practice Website
capabilities.cap: Honesty review gates publish. The OFFICE performs the deterministic build + publish after the clinician's okay — a worker never deploys.
capabilities.description: Build, fact-check, and publish one honest private-practice website on a hosted address the practice can share the day it's approved. The $-anchor deliverable.

capabilities.label: Growth Engine
capabilities.description: Data-driven content loop: pick topic from real demand signal, draft, GEO-optimize, honesty-review. No auto-publish.

capabilities.label: Weekly Blog
capabilities.description: One honest cited post per week plus three social teasers. Stops at honesty review.

capabilities.label: Backlink Engine
capabilities.description: White-hat earned backlinks: Quora, Reddit, Medium/Substack (rel=canonical), LinkedIn, HARO. Human posts every piece — agent never auto-posts.

capabilities.label: Page Copy
capabilities.description: Landing, about, services, and bio page copy. Clinician reviews and publishes — agent never touches the site.

capabilities.label: Decks & Handouts
capabilities.description: Psychoeducation slides, workshop decks, group handouts, supervision packets. Outputs a slide-by-slide draft with speaker notes, ready to paste into Google Slides or PowerPoint. Clinician builds the file and delivers.

capabilities.label: Proposals & Letters
capabilities.description: Referral-partner proposals, group contracts, supervision agreements, speaking offers. Outputs a ready-to-send letter draft to paste into Google Docs or Word. Clinician signs and sends.

capabilities.label: Ad Creative
capabilities.description: Three ad copy variants plus image briefs for Google, Meta, and directory placements. Clinician places the ad — agent never touches ad platforms.

capabilities.label: Newsletter
capabilities.cap: Delivery is the clinician's own email tool. Free tiers on beehiiv and MailerLite cap subscriber lists. Clinician manages their own plan and list size.
capabilities.description: Practitioner updates, psychoeducation digests, workshop announcements. Outputs a formatted draft. Clinician sends.

capabilities.label: Research Desk
capabilities.cap: Synthesis from the model's own general knowledge — no live database or web access. Every named source must be independently verified by the clinician before relying on it.
capabilities.description: Ask one clinical-topic or practice question; get an honest, verify-first research brief — scoped sub-questions, confidence-labeled findings, practical considerations, and a source checklist. Informational background, never clinical advice.

capabilities.label: FAQ Page
capabilities.description: A practice FAQ built from questions people really ask, answered honestly in the clinician's voice, with FAQPage structured data so answer engines can cite it. Clinician fills the blanks and publishes.

capabilities.label: Review Replies
capabilities.cap: The reply never confirms or denies that anyone is or was a client and never references care — the confidentiality rule is enforced at review, and the clinician posts every reply themselves.
capabilities.description: A compliant public reply to a public review: warm, generic about care, logistics only, conversation invited offline. Clinician approves and posts.

capabilities.label: Content Calendar
capabilities.description: A month of honest topics from real demand signal — one essay slot per week with its reason named, briefed and ready to feed Weekly Blog or Growth Engine runs. Clinician adopts or cuts each slot.

capabilities.label: Local Presence
capabilities.description: Audit of the practice's real directory and maps presence, honest profile copy, consistent name-address-phone, and local structured data. Clinician applies every change in their own accounts.

capabilities.label: Welcome Emails
capabilities.cap: Blank templates only — bracketed placeholder fields, no client data, and the office never connects to the practice's email or sends anything.
capabilities.description: A new-client welcome sequence — what to expect, logistics, paperwork reminders — as blank templates the clinician loads into their own email tool. Clinical outreach gets no template; that stays with the clinician.

capabilities.label: Social Clips
capabilities.cap: The OFFICE performs the deterministic clip render after the clinician's okay, and the clinician posts from their own account — a worker never renders early or posts.
capabilities.description: One approved essay becomes a short-video clip script and caption package — a verbatim passage, on-screen beats, and a caption that sells the read, never a clinical promise. Clinician approves before anything renders.

capabilities.label: Practice Paperwork
capabilities.cap: Starting drafts only, never legal advice — the clinician finalizes every document, with their attorney's review where their situation requires it.
capabilities.description: Plain-language starting drafts of practice paperwork — cancellation policy, fee agreement, telehealth consent, office policies — with blank placeholder fields and every unknown marked for the clinician. Clinician finalizes and adopts.

capabilities.label: Psychoed Handouts
capabilities.cap: Education only, cite-or-omit, ends with a clinical disclaimer — the clinician personalizes and hands it out; the office never gives material to a client.
capabilities.description: Client-ready psychoeducation handout on one topic, plain-reading level, every factual claim cited or omitted, disclaimer included. Clinician personalizes and hands out.

capabilities.label: Referral Outreach
capabilities.cap: Drafts only — the clinician supplies real contacts and sends every message personally; nothing is ever auto-sent.
capabilities.description: Build the referral network honestly: fit map, introduction letter, practice one-pager, and a respectful follow-up cadence — the clinician sends each message themselves.

capabilities.label: Client Comms Scripts
capabilities.cap: Blank templates only — bracketed placeholders, no client detail ever; the clinician personalizes and sends every message.
capabilities.description: The money-losing-conversation scripts as blank templates: waitlist slot offers, gentle rebooking, missed-appointment follow-up, and the cancellation-policy blurb.

capabilities.label: Fee + Insurance Letters
capabilities.cap: Formatting aids, never legal or billing advice — every amount is a placeholder the clinician fills; no promise about what any insurer pays.
capabilities.description: The hard money conversations as honest blank templates: out-of-network superbill explainer, Good Faith Estimate skeleton, rate-change letter, sliding-scale policy language.

capabilities.label: Directory Profiles
capabilities.cap: The clinician holds every directory login and pastes each update in — the office never edits a listing itself.
capabilities.description: One master profile, every directory consistent: inventory, master copy in the clinician's voice, per-directory variants, and a name-address-phone consistency checklist.

capabilities.label: Practice Metrics Digest
capabilities.cap: Built only from figures the clinician attaches — an empty month reads [SILENT], never a padded report; no number is ever estimated.
capabilities.description: A plain-English digest of the practice's numbers, from the clinician's own attached figures only, with readings labeled as readings — informs, never prescribes.
